# IChromeStyle.FontScale property

Global font scale (0.8–1.4). Same value as [`FontScale`](../INamedTheme/FontScale.md) (the concrete theme implements both) — exposed here so the uGUI window renderer can scale its text without taking a second INamedTheme dependency.

```csharp
public float FontScale { get; }
```
